NetScript
  • Tutorials
  • How-to guides
  • Reference
  • Explanation

How-to guides

How-to guides are task-oriented: focused recipes that walk you through solving a specific, real-world problem with NetScript. They assume you already know the basics — if you are brand new, start with the tutorials. For exact API signatures see the reference, and for the concepts behind a task read the explanation.

Guides

  • Add a first-party plugin — add workers, sagas, triggers, or streams to an existing workspace and verify the wiring.

NetScript user documentation.
